sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.hits (SearchEngineID Int32, Referer String);
UPDATE test.hits SET SearchEngineID = transform(SearchEngineID, [2, 3], [5, 6], 0) WHERE SearchEngineID IN (2, 3);
SELECT transform(SearchEngineID, [1, 2, 3], ['Bing', 'Yandex', 'Google'], 'Other') AS Engine, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM test.hits GROUP BY Engine ORDER BY Count DESC;
SELECT transform(domain(Referer), ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru'], ['www.yandex', 'www.google'], 'unknown') AS Domain FROM test.hits GROUP BY Domain;
